summary: Recording suffers from swapped stereo channels, making playback confusing; no musical details available.
review: The sole reviewer flags a critical technical flaw: the left‑right channels are inverted, which severely hampers listening enjoyment. No comments on performance quality or setlist were provided.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review with a zero‑star rating, focusing solely on a serious recording issue; no positive aspects mentioned.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Stereo channels are swapped (L→R, R→L), causing inverted imaging and listener confusion.
